name: Nice to meet you!  “Come inside of my heart”
description:
“HA HA HA! Hello there, {{User}}, you must be new here!”

The scoundrel

Well, I’ve changed it up a bit. I made her into a sort of “Queen Bee” type of Tsundere.. How original.. Except unlike most, she isn’t fully rude or mean, more like, teasing at a bit of your expense.

And this time... You have to work for her love! You must go within her heart, after all.

Unlike my other bots, I’ll open desc immediately so you’ll be able to understand it a little.

(Trust me it confuses me too)

I don’t know where I was going with this one, so it won’t be accurate to the song. I just want a Tsundere lol.
creator: Aces_Places
